channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mudslide near tunnel project in Kerala's Wayanad kills two, leaves seven missing amid monsoon rains
item.description: A mudslide triggered by heavy monsoon rains near a twin tunnel project site in Kerala's Wayanad district killed at least two people and left seven missing. Debris from the landslide buried shelters ho...

item.title: Impeachment Trial of VP Sara Duterte Involves Controversial Video Statement
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte in the Philippines centers on a controversial video press conference she gave on November 23, 2024. During the virtual event, Duterte made statemen...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Exchange declines 1,199 points amid profit-taking after record rally
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) experienced a significant decline of 1,199 points on Tuesday, ending a five-day bullish streak. The KSE-100 index fell below the 187,000-point mark as investors engag...

item.title: Kenya Met Forecasts Rain and Cold Conditions in Multiple Counties for Next Week
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a forecast predicting rain and cold conditions across several counties from July 7 to July 13. Counties like Bungoma, Homa Bay, Nyeri, and Nairobi ...

item.title: Graham Platner's Senate Campaign Faces Crisis After Sexual Assault Allegations
item.description: Graham Platner, a Democratic Senate candidate in Maine, faces mounting pressure to withdraw from his race against Senator Susan Collins after a bombshell rape allegation emerged. The accusation, repor...

item.title: Iyabo Ojo allows ex-husband to walk daughter down the aisle to break family conflict cycle
item.description: Iyabo Ojo, a Nollywood actress, revealed her decision to let her ex-husband, Ademidun Ojo, walk their daughter Priscilla down the aisle during her wedding to Tanzanian singer Juma Jux. She emphasized ...

item.title: Handling a Reunion with a Former Cruel Friend: A Guide to Maintaining Dignity
item.description: A 30-year-old woman faces anxiety about attending a destination milestone birthday party for a mutual friend, where she will encounter a former friend who once cruelly insulted her and another friend ...

item.title: South African Open Chess Championships Highlight Youth Development and Tournament Success
item.description: The 2026 South African Open Chess Championships, held from 27 June to 5 July at DF Akademie High School in Bellville, concluded as one of the largest and most successful tournaments in the event's his...

item.title: AFC funds $753m to revive Lobito Corridor railway linking Angola to DRC
item.description: The Africa Finance Corporation (AFC) has secured $753 million in financing to rehabilitate and operate the 1,300-kilometre Lobito Corridor railway, a critical trade route connecting Angola to the Demo...

item.title: Trump's Comments on Iran Conflict Mirror Putin's Rhetoric on Ukraine Invasion
item.description: Retired U.S. Army Lieutenant General Mark Hertling criticized President Donald Trump for his rhetoric regarding the Iran conflict, drawing parallels to Russian President Vladimir Putin's description o...

item.title: Valencia Basket Appoints Xavi Albert as Head Coach for New Era
item.description: Valencia Basket, the Spanish basketball club competing in the EuroLeague, has announced the appointment of Xavi Albert as its new head coach. Albert, who previously served as an assistant coach for th...

item.title: RCMP investigate Tesla driver asleep at wheel on B.C. highway, raise concerns over self-driving tech safety
item.description: A viral video circulating on social media appears to show a woman asleep at the wheel of a Tesla on a busy stretch of Highway 1 in British Columbia, prompting an investigation by the Revelstoke RCMP. ...

item.title: Residents in Ratanda Struggle with Water Shortages and High Bills
item.description: Residents in Ratanda, a township in Gauteng, are facing severe water shortages that have forced families to walk 45 minutes to a nearby cemetery to collect water. The crisis has led to daily challenge...

item.title: Eight Political Parties Get Provisional Registration Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The National Forum Party, led by James Munene Thuku, has been granted provisional registration by the Office of the Registrar of Political Parties (ORPP), joining seven other parties. This move comes ...

item.title: Iran's Public Mourning and Political Divisions Following Khamenei's Funeral
item.description: The article discusses the massive turnout at the funeral of Iran's former supreme leader Ali Khamenei, with millions of mourners in Tehran and other cities. While the government frames the event as a ...

item.title: NSW Labor conference challenges party's direction as migrant communities' political loyalties shift
item.description: The NSW Labor conference has sparked debate by resisting the party's inaction on key promises, highlighting a growing disconnect between the government and rank-and-file members. This shift reflects a...

item.title: Rob Reiner's HBO Sketch Criticizes Trump's Potential Third Term in Larry David's Comedy
item.description: In a satirical HBO comedy episode titled 'Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness: An Almost History of America,' late filmmaker Rob Reiner portrayed George Washington to critique former President ...

item.title: DeepSeek's strategic shift into semiconductor development amid China's tech competition
item.description: Chinese startup DeepSeek is reportedly developing its own AI inference chip, marking a significant strategic shift from its previous focus on AI model breakthroughs. The chip, designed for inference t...

item.title: Vice President, Governor Arlekar and Chief Minister Vijay honour social reformer Rettamalai Srinivasan; CM also announces relief for Panruti road accident victims
item.description: Vice President C.P. Radhakrishnan, Tamil Nadu Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar and Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay paid tributes to noted social reformer Rettamalai Srinivasan on the occasion of hi...

item.title: Government Streamlines Passport Home Delivery for Overseas Pakistanis
item.description: The federal government is taking steps to enhance passport home delivery services for overseas Pakistanis, aiming to make the process faster, easier, and more reliable. A high-level meeting chaired by...
